CreateElasticNetworkCard.clientToken: Idempotency token, an ASCII string of up to 64 characters. See [ClientToken Idempotency Support](VPC/API参考/通用说明.md#幂等性).
CreateElasticNetworkCard.name: Name of the elastic network card
CreateElasticNetworkCard.subnetId: Subnet ID to which the elastic network card belongs
CreateElasticNetworkCard.securityGroupIds: Collection of standard security groups to bind
CreateElasticNetworkCard.enterpriseSecurityGroupIds: Collection of enterprise security groups to bind
CreateElasticNetworkCard.privateIpSet.publicIpAddress: Public IP address (EIP) of the elastic network card
CreateElasticNetworkCard.privateIpSet.primary: Whether this is the primary IP
CreateElasticNetworkCard.privateIpSet.privateIpAddress: Private IP address of the elastic network card
CreateElasticNetworkCard.ipv6PrivateIpSet.publicIpAddress: Public IP address (EIP) of the elastic network card
CreateElasticNetworkCard.ipv6PrivateIpSet.primary: Whether this is the primary IP
CreateElasticNetworkCard.ipv6PrivateIpSet.privateIpAddress: Private IP address of the elastic network card
CreateElasticNetworkCard.description: Description of the elastic network card
CreateElasticNetworkCard.networkInterfaceTrafficMode: Distinguishes between elastic RDMA network card (ERI) and standard elastic network card (ENI)
